creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to fsbruva from comment #35)
I just built it with both DOCS=on and MANPAGES=on:

* https://services.unixathome.org/poudriere/build.html?mastername=131amd64-default-primary&build=2022-09-30_18h53m11s

With both off, it fails:

* https://services.unixathome.org/poudriere/build.html?mastername=131amd64-default-primary&build=2022-09-30_19h05m35s
